title: Men
content:
Here's to the men! God bless them!
        Worst of me sins, I confess them!
     In loving them all; be they great or small,
        So here's to the boys! God bless them!
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Men"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
